app_subtitle.message: Export AI chat conversations in multiple formats

scope_selected.description: Option to export only selected messages

notion_hint.message: Configure the Notion integration in Settings first.

error_no_active_tab.description: Error when active tab not found

error_not_supported_page.message: Please open ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Grok, or other supported AI platforms to export a conversation.

notification_siyuan_not_configured.message: SiYuan integration is not configured. Please enable it in the settings before exporting.
notification_siyuan_not_configured.description: Error shown when trying to export without SiYuan configuration

notification_obsidian_uri_too_long.message: The note is too large to send via obsidian://. Please export as a Markdown file instead.

notification_open_in_obsidian.description: Link text to open the generated Obsidian note

how_to_step2.message: Choose the export destination and format.

how_to_step4.message: The conversation is exported in the selected format.

obsidian_settings_description.message: Configure how notes are sent to your Obsidian vault.

obsidian_enable_description.message: Allow Chat2Note to send notes via obsidian:// links.

obsidian_vault_name_description.message: Enter the exact name of your Obsidian vault.

obsidian_vault_folder_description.message: Notes will be created inside this folder. Leave blank to use the vault root.

obsidian_open_mode_description.message: Choose what Chat2Note should do after sending the note.

obsidian_open_mode_none.description: Option to not open Obsidian automatically

obsidian_enforce_markdown_description.message: Obsidian only supports Markdown content. Keep this enabled to enforce Markdown automatically.

obsidian_include_yaml_frontmatter_descri.message: Add YAML frontmatter with metadata (title, source, platform, export date) at the top of the note.

obsidian_note_path_hint.message: Notes will be saved as $path$ inside "$vault$".
obsidian_note_path_hint.description: Hint showing the resulting Obsidian path

obsidian_target_hint.message: Make sure the Obsidian desktop app is installed and obsidian:// links are allowed.
obsidian_target_hint.description: Hint shown when Obsidian target is selected

obsidian_format_required.message: Obsidian export only supports Markdown. Please switch the format to Markdown.
obsidian_format_required.description: Error shown when a non-Markdown format is selected

siyuan_format_required.message: SiYuan export only supports Markdown. Please switch the format to Markdown.
siyuan_format_required.description: Error shown when a non-Markdown format is selected for SiYuan

appearance_description.message: Choose how Chat2Note should look across all extension pages.

language_settings_description.message: Choose your preferred language for the extension interface.

floating_button_position.description: Label for floating export button placement

floating_button_position_description.message: Choose where the floating export button appears or hide it entirely.
floating_button_position_description.description: Description for floating button placement setting

floating_button_position_hidden.description: Floating button placement option to hide the button

about_nav.description: Sidebar navigation label for About page

open_source_nav.description: Sidebar navigation label for open source page

about_intro.message: Chat2Note helps you capture AI conversations and keep them organized inside your own knowledge stack.
about_intro.description: Intro paragraph on the About page

about_website_description.message: Discover the latest product news, feature highlights, and pricing on example.invalid.
about_website_description.description: Helper text for official website card

about_user_manual_link_label.description: Link text for user manual card

about_user_manual_description.message: Step-by-step guides covering installation, exports, and notebook integrations.
about_user_manual_description.description: Helper text for user manual card

about_highlight_capture_description.message: Capture entire AI chat sessions with role-aware formatting and contextual metadata.

about_highlight_export_description.message: Export as Markdown, JSON, or plain text with customizable file names and metadata.

about_highlight_integrations_description.message: Send notes directly to Notion, Obsidian, and other connected notebooks in one click.

about_privacy_description.message: All processing happens in your browser. Chat2Note never uploads your conversations unless you explicitly connect a notebook destination.

about_links_description.message: Visit our official channels to stay updated and get help when you need it.

about_links_website_description.message: See feature overviews, pricing options, and announcements on example.invalid.

about_links_user_manual_description.message: Read how-to articles and best practices for exporting conversations.

about_links_support_description.message: Email our team at support@example.invalid for assistance or feedback.

about_support_title.message: Need help or want to contribute?

about_support_description.message: Email us any time and we'll get back within one business day.

about_support_issue_label.description: Support link text for GitHub issues

about_resources_release_notes.description: Resources link text for release notes

notion_enable_description.message: Enable to export conversations directly to a Notion database.

notion_api_token_description.message: Internal Integration Token from the Notion Integrations page

notion_database_id_description.message: ID of the target database, format: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

notion_include_properties.description: Checkbox to export metadata as Notion database properties

notion_include_properties_description.message: Export URL, exported time, platform, and message count to database properties. This is independent from the 'Include metadata in exports' option which only affects Markdown content.

notion_how_to_configure.message: How to configure the Notion integration

notion_setup_step2.message: Create a new integration and copy the "Internal Integration Token"

notion_setup_step3.message: Create a new database in Notion or use an existing one

notion_setup_step4.message: Share the database with your integration

notion_setup_step5.message: Copy the database ID (the 32 characters in the database URL)

notion_setup_step6.message: Fill in the information above and test the connection

notion_advanced_settings_description.message: Customize which properties to export and their column names in your Notion database

notion_property_exported_at_description.message: Timestamp when the conversation was exported

notion_property_platform_description.message: AI platform name (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude). Supports Select or Rich Text type

notion_property_message_count_descriptio.message: Total number of messages in the conversation

export_default_format_description.message: Choose the default file format for exports

export_default_scope_description.message: Choose whether to export entire conversations or only selected messages by default

export_include_metadata_description.message: Include source URL and export timestamps in exported files

export_markdown_template_description.message: Customize the markdown body. Available placeholders: {{title}}, {{metadata}}, {{messages}}, {{url}}, {{platform}}, {{exportedAt}}, {{exportedAtISO}}, {{messageCount}}.

export_message_template_description.message: Customize how each message is rendered. Placeholders: {{role}}, {{rawRole}}, {{content}}, {{index}}, {{messageCount}}, {{timestamp}}, {{timestampISO}}.

export_visible_targets_description.message: Choose which export destinations appear in the floating export button

config_export_info1.message: Exported files include schema version, app version, and the export timestamp.

config_export_info2.message: Importing a file will replace all current settings after confirmation.

config_export_info3.message: When exporting, you can choose whether to include sensitive information (API tokens).

config_export_info4.message: For security, sensitive information in imported files is automatically encrypted.

config_export_info5.message: Files containing sensitive information will have "-sensitive" in the filename.

notification_notion_config_incomplete.message: Please complete the Notion configuration first

notification_siyuan_config_incomplete.message: Please complete the SiYuan configuration first

confirm_reset_settings.message: Are you sure you want to reset all settings? This cannot be undone.

confirm_export_sensitive.message:
Do you want to include sensitive information (like Notion API tokens) in the export?

WARNING: Including sensitive information means the exported file will contain your API tokens.
   Only select this if you trust where the file will be stored and who will access it.

Click OK to include sensitive info, or Cancel to export without sensitive info.

confirm_import_config.message:
Importing a configuration file will overwrite your current settings. Continue?

Note: If the file contains sensitive information (API tokens), they will be securely encrypted.
If the file does not contain sensitive information, any existing tokens will be cleared.

context_menu_save_conversation.description: Context menu item to save conversation

notification_export_selection_empty.message: Select at least one message before exporting

notification_export_selection_invalid.message: The selected messages can't be exported. Adjust your selection and try again.

feedback_file_saved_to_downloads.message: File saved to your downloads folder

feedback_successfully_connected_to_notio.message: Successfully connected to the Notion API

feedback_unable_to_connect_to_notion_api.message: Unable to connect to the Notion API. Please check your configuration

error_network_connection_failed.message: Network connection failed. Please check your internet connection.

error_notion_api_request_failed.message: Notion API request failed. Please check your configuration.

error_storage_permissions_failed.message: Storage permissions failed. Please review the extension permissions.

error_page_parsing_failed.message: Page parsing failed. Please make sure you are on a supported chat page.

error_export_failed_please_try_again_lat.message: Export failed. Please try again later.

error_api_token_is_invalid_or_has_expire.message: API token is invalid or has expired

error_database_not_found_check_database_.message: Database not found. Please check the database ID.

error_api_calls_are_rate_limited_please_.message: API calls are rate limited. Please try again later.

error_missing_storage_permission_review_.message: Missing storage permission. Please review the extension settings.
